/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/object_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/object_detection_msgs/msg/_detection_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,"/home/david-wang/Desktop/Projects/Wisconsin Robotics/WRoverSoftware_25-26/build/object_detection_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:" /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libobject_detection_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
